docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,158.73 FILED BY CAMACHO, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT BALIDIO, CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMACHO, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALIDIO, CONNIE $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT.S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED ON 10/24/05: MOTIONDENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALIDIO, CONNIE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY BALIDIO, CONNIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CAMACHO, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BALIDIO, CONNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CAMACHO, LINDA CROSS DEFT WAIVES NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF. FILING FEE PAID $15.40
